name: Bin Packing Problem
description: Pack weighted items into the fewest bins possible without exceeding capacity.

details.summary: Minimize the number of bins needed to place all items under a fixed capacity.
learningGoals: See how bin packing explores placements recursively.
Understand why greedy packing can miss the optimum.
Compare packed bins with the remaining capacity in each bin.
notes: Items are entered one per line as weight or name, weight.
The solver uses exact search with pruning, so small instances are best.
This version minimizes the number of bins used.

complexity.time: Exponential in the worst case for exact search
complexity.space: O(n) recursion plus the current packing state

inputs.label: Items
inputs.description: One item per line. Use either 'weight' or 'name, weight'.

inputs.label: Bin Capacity
inputs.description: Maximum total weight allowed in each bin.
